things.name: Hunan Provincial Museum (Mawangdui)
things.description: 2,100-year-old Han Dynasty Countess preserved remarkably well with her silk wardrobe

things.name: Orange Isle (Juzizhou)
things.description: River island with the giant young Mao Zedong head sculpture looking upriver

things.name: Tianmen Mountain (Zhangjiajie)
things.description: 4-hour drive to Avatar's hallelujah mountains with a 99-turn road and glass bridge

things.name: Yuelu Mountain & Academy
things.description: UNESCO-listed Song Dynasty academy in the forested hills west of the city

things.name: Mao Zedong's Birthplace (Shaoshan)
things.description: Pilgrimage to the Chairman's village 130km southwest

things.name: Jiefang West Road Night Food Street
things.description: Changsha's legendary night food street with snake soup and stinky tofu

things.name: Tianxin Pavilion
things.description: Ming-dynasty pavilion on the city wall with Changsha views

things.name: IFS International Finance Square
things.description: Giant panda climbing the building facade - most Instagrammed spot in Changsha

things.name: Furong Town Scenic Area
things.description: Waterfalls cascading through an ancient Tujia minority town

things.name: Chou Doufu (Stinky Tofu)
things.description: Changsha's world-famous fermented tofu - deeply pungent, surprisingly delicious
